---
title: "Resistance Profiles"
subtitle: "MRC Gambia — 2024/25"   # optional
format: lshtm-html
---

```{r packages}
#| include: false
pacman::p_load(dplyr, stringr, tidyr, ggplot2, patchwork)
load("output/processed/df.Rdata")
```

# Resistance Patterns

UpSet plots show **co-resistance patterns** — which antibiotics tend to fail
together in the same isolate.

```{r upset-enterobacterales-urine}
#| fig-height: 7
#| out-width: "90%"
make_upset_3state(
  df[df$year %in% c("2024", "2025"), ],
  groups              = "Enterobacterales",
  sample_type_pattern = "urine",
  abx_cols            = ABX_URINE
)
```
